title: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 3
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Last_Stand_On_Ord_Mantell3.jpg]] |title=''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan:
Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3 |writer=[[Ryder Windham]] |penciller=[[Ramón F. Bachs]] |inker=[[Raul Fernandez]] |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Bodhi Tree]] |cover artist=Ramón F. Bachs |editor=[[David Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[March 21]], [[2001]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54471/star_wars_qui-gon_obi-wan_-_last_stand_on_ord_mantell_2000_3|text=Star Wars: Qui-Gon & Obi-Wan - Last Stand on Ord Mantell (2000) #3}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]The date of this story is established internally in relation to {{Film|I}}, which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell]]'' |issue=3 |next=last }} '''''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell'' 3''' was the third and final issue of the ''[[Star Wars: Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell]]'' comic book mini-series. It was released [[March 21]], [[2001]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''As the villainous Taxer Sundown prepares to flee Ord Mantell, a young woman is abducted by monstrous Mantellian savrips. Hoping to rescue the woman and capture Sundown, Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan Kenobi are forced to split up, but their separate paths lead to even more unexpected perils, and a face-off against intergalactic slavers. Can the two Jedi bring justice to the lawless world before time runs out? Find out in the shattering conclusion of ''Last Stand on Ord Mantell''.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: Last Stand on Ord Mantell 3}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Last_Stand_On_Ord_Mantell3.jpg|Cover File:Last_Stand_on_Ord_Mantell_3_art.png|Cover by [[Ramón F. Bachs]] File:Last_Stand_on_Ord_Mantell_3_Photo_variant.png|Photo variant cover ===Collected in=== *''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Rise of the Sith]]'' *''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Rise of the Sith
